mapper.insert: insert into comment(no, userID, context, season) values(#{no}, #{userID}, #{context}, #{season})
mapper.select: select r.comment_no, r.userID, r.context, r.writedate, r.season, r.no, u.username from comment AS r INNER JOIN user AS u on r.userID=u.userID where r.no=#{no} order by comment_no desc;
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET context=#{context} WHERE comment_no=#{comment_no}
